_comment: board_token = the slug in the company's careers URL. Verify by visiting the careers page: Greenhouse URLs look like job-boards.greenhouse.io/{token} or boards.greenhouse.io/{token}; Lever URLs look like jobs.lever.co/{token}; Ashby URLs look like jobs.ashbyhq.com/{token}. Only 'razorpay' below has been verified against a live board — treat the rest as placeholders to check yourself before relying on them.
